what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory ledger entry that records an image attachment added to the design-assets channel, including an attachment id, type, target image URI, and timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
standouts: Target URI/path contains literal spaces and parentheses: 'image (15)1'
conventions: Id follows an att- prefix convention
Uses ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone
Channel-memory ledger format with channel and attachment_type fields
concerns: Target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may cause parsing/encoding issues
No title, alt text, or descriptive context for the image
Body is empty, so the record carries no additional explanation
Future-dated timestamp may be intentional but is notable

questions: What asset or design artifact does 'image (15)1' represent?
